metadata.description: Agent skills for financial analysis and trading — options payoff, stock correlations, market data, social media research, and generative UI.

plugins.name: finance-market-analysis
plugins.description: Stock analysis, earnings, estimates, correlations, liquidity, ETFs, options payoff, and trading strategies via yfinance.

plugins.name: finance-social-readers
plugins.description: Read-only social media and research feeds — Twitter/X, Discord, LinkedIn, Telegram, Y Combinator, plus a generic opencli fallback covering 90+ finance/research sources.

plugins.name: finance-data-providers
plugins.description: External API data — sentiment via Adanos, comprehensive data via Funda AI, Hormuz Strait monitoring, TradingView desktop reader, and Hyperliquid perp/spot reader.

plugins.name: finance-startup-tools
plugins.description: Multi-perspective startup analysis frameworks for VC investors, job applicants, and founders.

plugins.name: finance-ui-tools
plugins.description: Generative UI design system for rendering interactive HTML/SVG widgets in Claude conversations.

plugins.name: finance-skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, evaluate, and iterate on high-quality agent skills with structured guidance, quality scoring, and best-practice enforcement.
